# DeviceDetails


## Properties

Name | Type | Description | Notes
------------ | ------------- | ------------- | -------------
**ipCountryCode** | **string** | This field accepts country of origin of the IP address for the device used by the customer for initiating the request. | [default to undefined]
**deviceInfo** | **string** | Information of the device e.g. Mac OS. | [default to undefined]
**ipAddress** | **string** | IP address of the device in IP address formatting e.g. 45.48.241.198 | [default to undefined]
**sessionId** | **string** | A unique identifier for the session, generated by your application. | [default to undefined]
